name: Fantasy world Hearth
description:
Have you ever tried to be someone... Important? Unimportant? Stupid, or overly smart? That's exactly the kind of opportunity Janitor AI offers... And I'm going to expand that with a detailed world description! 46 countries, unique characters for several countries (not all, I'm not a masochist), and a world description!

The world of Hearth! Oh, what a wonderful, wondrous world! Never forget that in this world, dangers are everywhere... And so are opportunities.

––

Intro 1 - she finds you at slave market

Intro 2 - she finds you at king's palace

Intro 3 - she finds you fishing (in work)

Intro 4 - she asking for your boat (in work)

If you have any ideas - reply on my comment
creator: Wuser1917
